'''Ixxis Cranata''' was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] storyteller from [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]], regarded as one of the best his people had ever known. Every day he would sit and relate tales to anybody who would listen. Such was his popularity that several authors traveled to Ithor in order to hear him speak and later wrote down his tales.

After the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] historians visited Ithor in the hopes that Cranata could help them recover some of the stories lost when Palpatine rewrote history.
